title: OSS-IQ Export Schema v1.3
description: Schema for OSS-IQ project metrics export data (v1.3 uses a shared dependency_tree with integer ct references into constraint_type_map, explicit id on transitive packages, and omits null/empty fields for compact output)

schema_version.description: Version of the export schema format

export_timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the export was generated

summary.description: Summary statistics for the scanned project

packages_with_cves.description: Number of packages with known CVEs

total_cves.description: Total number of CVEs across all packages

packages_outdated.description: Number of packages behind the latest version

transitive_packages.description: Transitive dependency metrics, one entry per unique (package_name, installed_version); path and constraint data lives in dependency_tree

dependency_tree.description: Dependency tree rooted at each direct production dependency; nodes carry edge-specific constraint data and reference transitive_packages by id

constraint_type_map.description: Lookup table for ct integer field in DependencyTreeNode; index 0=DECLARED, 1=NARROWED, 2=PINNED, 3=ADDITIVE, 4=OVERRIDE

DependencyTreeRoot.description: Root entry in the dependency tree, anchored at a direct production dependency

package_name.description: Name of the direct production dependency

children.description: Transitive packages directly required by this production dependency

DependencyTreeNode.description: One node in the dependency tree; ref matches id in transitive_packages, ct indexes into constraint_type_map

ref.description: Matches the id field of a TransitivePackageMetrics entry

ct.description: Index into the top-level constraint_type_map array

version_constraint.description: Version constraint declared by the immediate parent

dependency_name.description: Alias name declared by the immediate parent (absent when same as package_name)

extras.description: PyPI extras for this dependency (absent for non-PyPI or when unused)

children.description: Transitive packages directly required by this package

TransitivePackageMetrics.description: Metrics for a transitive package, deduplicated by (package_name, installed_version); path and constraint data lives in dependency_tree

id.description: Zero-based index into the transitive_packages array; matched by DependencyTreeNode.ref

is_optional_dependency.description: Whether this is a development/optional dependency; always false for transitive deps

time_lag_days.description: Days between installed and latest version

releases_lag.description: Number of releases between installed and latest

cve.description: Known CVEs for this package (absent when empty)

constraint_source_file.description: File that introduced a non-DECLARED constraint for this package (absent when DECLARED)

license.description: SPDX license identifiers parsed from the package license expression

purl.description: Package URL (PURL) per ECMA-386, e.g. pkg:pypi/requests@2.25.1 or pkg:npm/lodash@4.17.21

PackageMetrics.description: Metrics for a single package (used for production and development dependencies)

dependency_name.description: Alias name as declared in the project manifest (null or same as package_name when no alias is used)

is_optional_dependency.description: Whether this is a development/optional dependency

time_lag_days.description: Days between installed and latest version

releases_lag.description: Number of releases between installed and latest

dependency_path.description: Ancestor chain from root to this package (null for direct dependencies)

version_constraint.description: Version constraint declared in the project manifest (e.g. '^1.2.3', '>=1.0,<2.0')

license.description: SPDX license identifiers parsed from the package license expression

purl.description: Package URL (PURL) per ECMA-386, e.g. pkg:pypi/requests@2.25.1 or pkg:npm/lodash@4.17.21

constraint_type.description: How the version constraint was applied: DECLARED (loose/default spec), NARROWED (explicit range with bounds), PINNED (exact version), ADDITIVE (narrows via constraints file), or OVERRIDE (forces a version regardless of other requirements)

constraint_source_file.description: File that introduced a non-DECLARED constraint (e.g. 'package.json' for npm overrides, 'pyproject.toml' for uv, 'requirements.txt' for pip classic)

extras.description: PyPI extras requested for this dependency (e.g. ["security", "tests"] from requests[security,tests]); null for non-PyPI or when no extras are used
